headerDisplay: Send emails via iCloud SMTP when switches are triggered

username.title: iCloud email address (sender)
username.description: iCloud email address used for SMTP authentication and as the default recipient if no recipient is configured on a switch.

password.title: App-specific password
password.description: Generate an App-Specific Password on https://account.apple.com

name.title: Switch name
name.description: Please use only alphanumeric, space, and apostrophe characters.

to.title: Recipient email(s)
to.description: If not set, the default iCloud email address will be used. Multiple recipients supported (comma-separated).

cooldown.title: Cooldown (seconds)
cooldown.description: Minimum time in seconds before this switch can send another email. Prevents accidental repeated triggers or automation loops.
